nodes.name: ETLC entrance
nodes.instruction: You're at the ETLC entrance. Walk straight toward the main corridor.

nodes.name: ETLC corridor
nodes.instruction: Continue straight. Head toward Discovery Commons.

nodes.name: Discovery Commons
nodes.instruction: You're at Discovery Commons. Turn toward NREF, Natural Resources Engineering Facility.

nodes.name: NREF connection
nodes.instruction: Walk past NREF toward GSB, General Services Building.

nodes.name: GSB entrance
nodes.instruction: You've arrived at GSB, General Services Building.
